name: ORBITAL MASS
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF ORBITAL AND OCULAR DISORDERS

demographics.Location: single muscle (in adults); multiple muscles (in children)

distribution: single muscle (in adults); multiple muscles (in children)
discriminating_features: avidly enhancing orbital soft-tissue mass with involvement of extraocular muscles + lacrimal glands

general: avidly enhancing orbital soft-tissue mass with involvement of extraocular muscles + lacrimal glands
